prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to england and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This guidance on the administration of human normal immunoglobulin (HNIG) for post-exposure prophylaxis of measles is applicable in England as it involves NHS trusts and healthcare practices governed by UK Health Security Agency guidelines, which specifically includes England.
